task_completion.description: Verify that the industry-specific bookmark folders have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) displaying the exact folders: 'Airspace', 'Weather', 'Photogrammetry', 'Hardware', and 'Off-Duty'.

task_completion.description: Verify that precise geolocation permissions are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Site Settings for Location (chrome://settings/content/location) showing that sites can ask for location or specific location permissions are granted.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chrome's default download directory is optimized for massive datasets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Downloads settings page (chrome://settings/downloads) showing the 'Location' explicitly set to '/home/ga/Documents/Mission_Data/Raw_Images'.

task_completion.description: Verify that WebGL flags are enabled for 3D flight path visualization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Experiments/Flags page (chrome://flags) showing WebGL-related flags (such as 'WebGL Draft Extensions' or 'Override software rendering list') searched and their dropdowns set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom NOTAM search engine is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Manage search engines page (chrome://settings/searchEngines) showing a site search entry with the keyword 'notam' and a URL containing 'notams.aim.faa.gov'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings rather than editing configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser window open and being interacted with (settings pages, flags, bookmark manager), rather than terminal windows editing JSON or Preferences files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements (tabs, address bar, settings menu) must match Google Chrome, not a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just open the instruction text file to display the expected values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required settings must be visible in their respective Chrome configuration pages, not just highlighted or displayed in a text editor showing 'flight_ops_standard.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected bookmark folders are exactly: 'Airspace', 'Weather', 'Photogrammetry', 'Hardware', and 'Off-Duty'. The Chrome download directory must be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Mission_Data/Raw_Images'. The custom search engine must use the keyword 'notam' and its URL must contain 'notams.aim.faa.gov'.
